meta.northy_message: Monday came and went. No visible revenue activity. DAY 16. 40 days to Sept 1. Cash $97.7K. Tuesday: three revenue actions before noon. The math doesn't negotiate.

act_now.title: Systems-Mode Trap: DAY 16 — Monday produced no visible revenue, 40 days to Sept 1
act_now.detail: DAY 16. Monday's test not passed — no visible revenue activity in any data source. Transcripts still processing so can't be definitive, but nothing surfaced. Cash $97.7K. ~4 weeks runway.
act_now.action: Tuesday: three revenue actions before noon. Text Jodi. Call one superintendent. Review one pipeline deal. Revenue first — not product catch-up, not agent fixes.

act_now.title: Zig flying blind — HubSpot pipeline data stale since July 6 (16 days)
act_now.detail: Last live HubSpot pull July 6. 16 days without pipeline visibility. 51 of 68 renewal districts (72%) still in 'To Be Renewed.' 40 days to Sept 1. Revenue decisions can't be made on vibes.
act_now.action: Direct Raju: restore Zig's HubSpot MCP access before any other fleet work. Live pipeline data = single highest-leverage infra fix.

act_now.title: Patrick equity cliff OVERDUE +6 — 31 days of lag
act_now.detail: July 15 passed. Now July 21. Six days overdue. 31 days total lag time. The Crucial Conversations framework calls this out: short lag = healthy, long lag = rotting. The avoidance compounds every day.
act_now.action: Call him Wednesday. Use STATE. 100% honest AND 100% respectful. The conversation is harder than the avoidance — but the avoidance is already 31 days hard.

act_now.title: Revenue target contradiction: Zig at $1.5M vs Steve at $1M — 25 days uncorrected
act_now.detail: Zig's target: $1.5M by Aug 1. Real target: $1M by Sept 1. 25 days uncorrected. Every day Zig optimizes for the wrong number. 10-second fix waiting 25 days.
act_now.action: Slack Zig: 'Target is $1M by Sept 1. Recompute against that.' Ten seconds.

act_now.title: Natasha renewals unassigned — 67 days, ~$42K ILTexas + 5 others
act_now.detail: ILTexas $42K + 5 other renewals. Over two months unassigned. Revenue sitting on a shelf with 40 days to go.
act_now.action: Assign to Teela or Jan. Doesn't need a meeting — needs an owner.

act_now.title: Both revenue Slack channels archived — no revenue coordination surface
act_now.detail: #sales_revenue-ninjas and #renewal-gtm-alignment both archived June 29. Revenue coordination has no Slack home. Archived channels = archived priorities. CONFIRMED pattern.
act_now.action: Reactivate one revenue channel or state in #ai-ceo-team that revenue coordination lives there.

act_now.title: Cockpit uses three retired colors — #12A38C, #107569, #101828
act_now.detail: Design v4.0.0 retired #12A38C, #107569, #0D5A52. Cockpit still uses them. Brand canon: #15B79E / #0E766A / #111928. Cockpit is the only surface not updated.
act_now.action: Decision: align cockpit to new palette or declare exception. One Slack message settles it.

intel.title: L1-L4 Architecture: Resolver SDK → Enrichment → Scheduler → BrainWriter
intel.pattern: 4-layer architecture replaces 69 bespoke scripts with 1 uniform interface. BrainWriter makes hallucinations structurally impossible (LLM output → JSON-Schema validator → Scaffolder). Maps cleanly to founding trio: Forge = L1+L4, Northy = L2, Hermes = L3.
